creator: ports@c0decafe.net
text:
helo Stefan,

On Mon, Nov 22, 2010 at 4:35 PM, Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org> wrote:
> please note that there is already a port for punjab in net-im/py-punjab,
> so I will close this PR. If you want to submit an update to it, please
> send a *new PR* with a unified diff (as produced by "diff -urN"), as that
> makes it easier to see what changed.

my bad, not sure how i missed that one.

just submitted ports/152497 with an update (+ownership?) pr.

thanks!
